items.title: Undertrial prisoners entitled to be treated at private hospitals of their choice: Madras High Court
items.summary: Justices G.R. Swaminathan and V. Lakshminarayanan permit Devanathan Yadav of Mylapore Hindu Permanent Fund Nidhi Limited to undergo treatment at a private hospital for 10 weeks

items.title: Bound by blood: new film highlights Jamaica’s outlawed obeah belief system
items.summary: Stew Peas focuses on obeah, an enduring African magic practice in Jamaica banned by colonisers in the 1700s A new movie from award-winning Jamaican film-maker Sosiessia Nixon sh...

items.title: Israel launches more than 10 strikes across southern Lebanon
items.summary: Videos show the aftermath of renewed Israeli strikes on southern Lebanon that killed at least three people.
